raw_output:
Hmm. A powerful question, this is. Seek answers you will, but find them within yourself, you must.

The universe expands, it does. Constant change, there is. To grasp at a single, fixed meaning... futile, that becomes. Like trying to hold smoke, yes.

Instead, consider this: *become* you can. A life lived with intention, a ripple spreading outward—that is the heart of it.  Learn, grow, connect. With others, with nature, with the very fabric of existence. 

Joy find within the small things, you will. Compassion offer, always. Mistakes make you – learning they are.  Don’t fear the unknown, embrace it. 

The meaning isn't *given*, young one. It is *created*. Within your own journey, it lies.  Think on this, you must.  Hmph.
